Until it was a big thing, some months ago people started to dissapear, and due the small ammount of people living there rumours spread like wild-fire, one of those rumours were about a serial killer arround the Town, most people didn't believed such thing, after all it's a peaceful Town! Who would want to ruin it? ”

“ Some weeks later a new face appeared arround the Town of basically out of nowhere, a White coyote who called himself itami, rumours spreaded about him being from France or being rich because of his fancy clothing, but.. eventually the rumours stopped and he was warmly welcomed but.. for You something was off, he was way too friendly and sometimes off-putting, but it's probably nothing... Right..? ”
